Available only when crafting for cosmic exploration.

Available only when fishing for cosmic exploration.

Guarantees that the next brazen action will increase collectability with maximum effectiveness, and increases the chance that the next meticulous action will not affect integrity by 40%.
Available only when gathering for cosmic exploration.

Fires three carrot rounds. Auto-target available when enabled.
<UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>Additional Effect: <UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>10% chance of granting <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Carrot Power<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>

Fires a vitamin-rich blast capable of destroying corrupted crystals.
Can only be executed while under the effect of <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Carrot Power<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>.
Drives loader forward, bulldozing irregular spongoi in its path.
Instantly return to the current cosmic exploration area's rainbow crystal.
Deploys a lunar adamantite drill to render moderately sized corrupted crystals in front of you to powder. Has no effect on larger crystals.

Fires a flare bright enough to illuminate the dark side of any stellar object.
※Has no effect in battle.
Sprays a jet of flame in a cone before you, incinerating small spongoi. Has no effect on larger spongoi.
Creates a vortex of high-pressure, mushroom-mashing wind aether around the mech.
Increases movement speed by 50%. Effect ends upon reuse.
Allows the carrot gun to select a target automatically.
Prevents the carrot gun from selecting a target automatically.
